hub_hero_subtitle: Tap it, light it, let it tick.
hub_hero_substatement: Sounds, visuals, clocks, timers, stickers, extensions — an interactive studio that builds things with a beat you can tap.
hub_works_item_spv2_desc: A Chrome extension that listens to YouTube and draws what it hears. Live on the Web Store.
hub_works_item_galton_timer_desc: A Galton-board timer where balls fall into a bell curve. Watch time pile up as physics.
hub_works_item_wall_clock_desc: A browser that becomes a wall clock. Burn-in shift and circadian color, built in from day one.
hub_works_item_galton_tempo_desc: A rhythm generator that fires grains on the beat and lets gravity decide the swing.
hub_works_item_vogel_timer_desc: Time does not tick down, it fills up. A golden-angle spiral blooms while the clock runs.
hub_works_item_fractal_beat_desc: A visualizer where fractals grow to the beat. Still feeling out the geometry of music.
hub_works_item_lp_stamps_desc: LINE sticker slot, in preparation. Taking the studio's characters out to another channel.
hub_lab_body: Before it taps, lights, or ticks — the shelf where unfinished sketches sit out, still warm, where you can touch them.
lab_meta_description: The workbench, mid-build. Drafts of motion, beat, and light — left out where you can touch them.
lab_lede_body: Not the showroom — the shelf where unfinished sketches sit. Pieces that survive eventually slip into something in Works.
lab_001_intro: Three takes on a slow-moving backdrop, one per technique. Drag the sliders to find a speed and amplitude you like.
lab_001_a_caption: Pure CSS gradients and transforms. Light, honest, nowhere to hide.
lab_001_b_caption: SVG feTurbulence, raising the grain. Color edges fogged with sand.
lab_001_c_caption: A fragment shader drawing one continuous field. Heaviest of the three, and the one that reaches furthest.
lab_002_intro: Colors shift inside the tank — pale gold, cloudy white, deep amber. Which one pours is yours to choose. A look inside the moment before a Tipsy Tap pour. The long version that keeps cycling is fermenting behind the studio itself.
lab_002_a_caption: Three beers, switched by hand to compare the color and warmth just before the tap. A single fragment shader. The auto-cycling version simmers as the studio's backdrop.
lab_002_switch_hint: Use arrow keys to switch beer
lab_footer_note: Sketches that grow up move over to Works. Take any fragment you like with you — it's MIT.
